notes: Solid snake implementation with input queue, speed scaling, and audio; minor issue is game-over restart goes to START screen instead of directly restarting, and no grid lines or visual polish beyond basic colored squares.
Solid implementation with audio and a good speed curve, but the input queue allows queued reverse suicides and the game loop fast-forwards after switching tabs.
Core snake gameplay works and looks appropriate, but restart flow is awkward, queued input/reversal handling is not fully robust, and the presentation is basic rather than polished.
